mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message ( room_id, role, content, deleted_yn, message_type, file_name, file_url ) VALUES ( #{roomId}, #{role}, #{content}, 'N', #{messageType}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, room_id AS roomId, role, content, deleted_yn AS deletedYn, message_type AS messageType, file_name AS fileName, file_url AS fileUrl, created_at AS createdAt FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT id, room_id AS roomId, role, content, deleted_yn AS deletedYn, message_type AS messageType, file_name AS fileName, file_url AS fileUrl, created_at AS createdAt FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted_yn = 'N' AND message_type = 'TEXT' AND content IS NOT NULL AND content != '' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, room_id AS roomId, role, content, deleted_yn AS deletedYn, message_type AS messageType, file_name AS fileName, file_url AS fileUrl, created_at AS createdAt FROM chat_message WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND deleted_yn = 'N' AND content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id ASC
